title: Verify homepage title
expected_result: 'GitHub · Change is constant. GitHub keeps you ahead.'

title: Verify number of links on the homepage
steps: Count the number of links present on the page after navigating to <https://github.com>

title: Verify broken links on the homepage
steps: Check for any broken links from the given list of broken links

title: Verify number of buttons on the homepage
steps: Count the number of buttons present on the page after navigating to <https://github.com>

title: Verify number of forms on the homepage
steps: Count the number of forms present on the page after navigating to <https://github.com>

title: Verify if non-existing page can be accessed
steps: Navigate to a non-existing URL such as <https://github.com/nonexistentpage>

title: Verify if sensitive data is exposed on the homepage
steps: Search for any sensitive data such as API keys, passwords, or tokens on the page after navigating to <https://github.com>

title: Verify if Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists on the homepage
steps: Check for any Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities on the page after navigating to <https://github.com>

title: Verify if Clickjacking is present on the homepage
steps: Check for any Clickjacking attacks on the page after navigating to <https://github.com>

title: Verify if login/signup feature requires validation
steps: Navigate to the signup page <https://github.com/login> and fill in empty fields to check for validation.
